title: Students Unable to Eat Lunch
input_format: Table: Students with columns student_id (int), preference (int, 0 or 1). Table: Sandwiches with columns sandwich_id (int), type (int, 0 or 1), position (int).
output_format: Result table with column count showing the number of students unable to eat
constraints:
- 1 <= number of students <= 100
- preference is 0 or 1
- type is 0 or 1
